description: Submit a new post to a subreddit (MED-02 read-only-safe-origin gate fixture: a HYPOTHETICAL write op under reddit.com, the origin classified SAFE only because the vendored slice was read-only).
_fixture: MED-02 (38-REVIEW): a hypothetical reddit WRITE descriptor. reddit.com is classified SAFE (absent from service-denylist.json sensitiveOrigins) ONLY because the vendored reddit slice exposes read ops alone. checkReadOnlySafeOrigins() in verify-catalog-crosscheck.mjs MUST flag this descriptor (service reddit.com + sideEffectClass write) so a future re-vendor that adds a reddit write FAILS the build (forcing a re-classification to sensitive) rather than shipping it writable-under-Auto. _fixtures/ is excluded by readJsonDir non-recursion so it never ships and never reaches the CLI corpus sweep.
